title: aphesis #0859
definition:
1) release from bondage or imprisonment
 2) forgiveness or pardon, of sins (letting them go as if they
    had never been committed), remission of the penalty
nasbUsage:

 2) forgiveness or pardon, of sins (letting them go as if they
